issues.detail: The instructions only cover happy path examples and do not address error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a React 18+ environment, limiting its applicability to other frameworks or platforms.

scenarios.name: Accessible select dropdown
scenarios.rationale: Treatment composes react-aria-components Select/Label/Button/Popover/ListBox/ListBoxItem with onSelectionChange and inherits keyboard + screen-reader behavior; baseline rolls a custom combobox with manual ARIA attributes that misses the primitive composition the rubric requires.

scenarios.name: Modal focus trap
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps the dialog in FocusScope with contain/restoreFocus/autoFocus exactly as documented; baseline implements a manual tab-key focus trap that does not match the React Aria FocusScope pattern the rubric checks for.
